statement: AMD Instinct won broad deployment: OpenAI named AMD a core strategic compute partner starting with MI450, Oracle Cloud will deploy MI355X rack-scale, and Dell, HPE, and Supermicro are integrating MI350 Series.
why: Marquee design wins (OpenAI, Oracle, top OEMs) expand AMD Instinct's addressable demand and installed base.

impact.mechanism: Strategic partnerships and OEM/CSP integration pull demand toward AMD accelerators.

evidence.source: AMD Blogs - Instinct MI350 Series / Advancing AI (design wins)
evidence.excerpt: OpenAI will work with AMD as a core strategic compute partner to drive large-scale deployments of AMD technology starting with the AMD Instinct MI450 series and rack-scale AI solutions.
